{"query":"Klarna partnership Lufthansa Group Qatar Airways Quay Article announcement 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1668,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://worldaviationfestival.com/blog/airlines/lufthansa-group-adds-klarnas-buy-now-pay-later-option/","title":"Lufthansa Group adds Klarna's buy now, pay later option","content":"Lufthansa Group have announced a new partnership with Swedish financial services firm Klarna for buy now, pay later booking.
The Klarna payment options will be rolled out across the network by Q2 2026.
- 59% of customers prefer AI customer service — but only if it resolves their request April 29, 2026"},{"url":"https://newsroom.lufthansagroup.com/en/lufthansa-group-partners-with-klarna-and-adyen-to-offer-flexible-payment-options-for-travelers/","title":"Lufthansa Group Partners with Klarna and Adyen to Offer Flexible Payment Options for Travelers","content":"“At Lufthansa Group, we put the needs and a convenient booking experience of our customers at the center of everything we do,” says Oliver Schmitt, Managing Director Lufthansa Group Digital Hangar.
The rollout will begin in mid-November across Lufthansa Group’s home markets and a selection of further important markets, with plans to expand across all Lufthansa Group Network Airlines, namely Lufthansa, Austrian Airlines, SWISS and Brussels Airlines until the end of Q2/2026.
Consumers can pay with Klarna online, in-store and through Apple Pay & Google Pay.
More than 850,000 retailers trust Klarna’s innovative solutions to drive growth and loyalty, including Uber, H&M, Saks, Sephora, Macy’s, Ikea, Expedia Group, Nike and Airbnb.
Klarna is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: KLAR)."},{"url":"https://aerospaceglobalnews.com/news/lufthansa-klarna-flexible-payment-fly-now-pay-later/","title":"Lufthansa will let airline passengers Klarna their next flight","content":"Lufthansa Group has announced a new partnership with Klarna and Adyen that allows travellers booking its flights to choose flexible payment options at checkout.
Oliver Schmitt, Managing Director, Lufthansa Group Digital Hangar, said of the airline’s new payment options, “By leveraging our digital capabilities and partnering with Klarna and Adyen, we can now offer greater choice and flexibility in how customers pay for their journeys.”
Several other airlines have already introduced flexible payment schemes via third-party financing or payment-plan partners.
Airline — Payment option — Provider / partner — Key features / markets
Qatar Airways — Pay in 30 days, Pay in 3, Financing — Klarna via Worldpay — Flexible Klarna options at checkout across 17 European markets, including pay-later and instalment plans."},{"url":"https://via.ritzau.dk/pressemeddelelse/14696001/klarna-set-to-take-off-with-lufthansa-group-bringing-flexible-payments-to-travellers-across-europe-and-the-us?publisherId=90456&lang=en","title":"Klarna Set to Take off With Lufthansa Group, Bringing Flexible Payments to Travellers Across Europe and the U.S. | Business Wire","content":"The new agreement is facilitated by Klarna’s integration with Adyen, the financial technology platform of choice for leading businesses.
From November, Lufthansa Group customers will be able to choose Klarna’s flexible payment options at checkout when booking travel experiences.
The new options will be available first to customers in Austria, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Germany, the Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, Switzerland, and the United States.
“Travel is one of the most meaningful investments people make,” said David Sykes, Chief Commercial Officer at Klarna.
“We’re proud to support Lufthansa Group with our technology and global payments network,” said Alexa von Bismarck, President EMEA at Adyen.
With over 114 million global active Klarna users and 3.4 million transactions per day, Klarna’s AI-powered payments and commerce network is empowering people to pay smarter with a mission to be available everywhere for everything."}]}

Lufthansa Group, Europe’s leading airline group, today announced a new partnership with Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, and Adyen, the global financial technology platform of choice for leading businesses. Beginning in mid-November, Lufthansa Group customers will gain access to Klarna’s flexible payment solutions—powered by Adyen’s global payments infrastructure—when booking travel experiences. The collaboration underscores Lufthansa Group’s ongoing commitment to customer-centric innovation, Klarna’s mission to deliver smarter ways to pay, and Adyen’s role as a trusted payments partner enabling seamless global commerce. “Together with Lufthansa Group and Adyen, we’re making it easier for travelers to book with confidence, by giving them more flexible and transparent ways to pay.”. “By combining Adyen’s reliable infrastructure with Klarna’s innovative payment solutions, Lufthansa Group customers will benefit from a smooth and flexible checkout experience.”.","score":0.6216563,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://aerospaceglobalnews.com/news/lufthansa-klarna-flexible-payment-fly-now-pay-later","title":"Fly now, pay later: Lufthansa will let passengers Klarna their flights","content":"Lufthansa introduces Klarna's pay-later and financing options, joining airlines like Qatar Airways, Air France–KLM and Air Canada.","score":0.5087155,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.06,"request_id":"f2f7e7cb-8b38-4d8d-9151-37b4163dd32d"}
